meta_title: For Founders: Claude Code skills setup to Solve no portfolio (Beginner Idea List)
meta_description: Learn how to Claude Code skills setup and overcome no portfolio. A Beginner-level Idea List using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Founders: Claude Code skills setup to Solve no portfolio
content.seo_description: Learn how to Claude Code skills setup and overcome no portfolio. A Beginner-level Idea List using Antigravity and Claude Code to build your SaaS credibility.
content.answer_block: Overcoming a lack of portfolio requires shipping high-quality, functional AI agents rapidly. By leveraging Claude Code to automate boilerplate and Antigravity to structure your architecture, you can deploy a professional-grade SaaS MVP in hours. This setup turns your coding environment into a high-velocity engine that demonstrates real-world technical competency.
content.intro:
The cold reality of the SaaS market is that nobody cares about your resume; they care about what you have shipped. If your GitHub is empty, you are invisible to investors and customers alike. The 'no portfolio' trap is a vicious cycle where you need clients to build, but you need builds to get clients.

We break that cycle today. By integrating Claude Code’s autonomous reasoning with Antigravity’s structural precision, you aren't just writing code—you are building a high-fidelity proof of work. This is the blueprint for founders who need to move from 'idea' to 'live product' before the weekend ends.

steps.title: Define the Architecture Scope
steps.description: Establish a clear, modular architecture for your MVP to ensure scalability and ease of deployment.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a high-level technical architecture for a SaaS MVP that solves a specific user pain point. Include a folder structure, tech stack recommendations, and a database schema.

steps.title: Automate Boilerplate Generation
steps.description: Use Claude Code to scaffold the project structure, saving hours of manual setup.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a list of essential boilerplate components for a production-ready SaaS, including authentication, payment integration, and error logging.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Generate the base project structure and install core dependencies based on the architecture plan.'

steps.title: Build the Core Value Feature
steps.description: Focus on the 'killer feature' that provides immediate user value.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Draft the logic for a core feature that solves [User Problem]. Ensure the code is clean, documented, and follows industry standards.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Implement the core logic for [Feature Name] with robust error handling and unit tests.'

steps.title: Implement Professional Testing
steps.description: Add automated tests to demonstrate quality and maintainability, a key indicator for potential clients.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write a suite of integration tests for the authentication flow and the core feature logic created in previous steps.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Create and run Jest tests for the current implementation to ensure 80% code coverage.'

steps.title: Optimize for Deployment
steps.description: Prepare the codebase for a live environment, ensuring performance and security.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a deployment checklist and configuration files for a standard cloud provider like Vercel or Railway.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Finalize environment variables and create a production-ready build configuration.'

pro_tips: Always commit your work with 'Claude-generated' tags to maintain transparency in your commit history.
Use Antigravity to generate documentation alongside your code; a project without a README is essentially invisible.
Prioritize building one complex feature over five simple ones; depth demonstrates engineering maturity.
Keep your Claude Code sessions focused on specific tasks to prevent the AI from hallucinating outside the scope of your current module.
Review every line of code generated; use the tool as a pair programmer, not a replacement for your own architectural oversight.
content.next_steps: Once your MVP is live, deploy it to a staging URL, write a case study about the development process, and share it on LinkedIn or X to begin building your professional reputation.
content.conversion_block: Stop waiting for the perfect moment to prove your skills. By leveraging these AI tools, you can build a high-converting portfolio piece in a single weekend. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
